messages.content: today was just a lot. it's the anniversary of my mom passing and i didn't really tell anyone i was struggling with it

I'm really glad you're sharing it here, even if you couldn't with people around you today.

That's a heavy thing to carry quietly. How are you doing right now?
thanks for just sitting with me on it. i don't usually let myself actually cry but i think i needed to

That means a lot that you felt safe enough to let that out, even a little.

There's something about holding it together all day that can be so exhausting in its own way. Like you're spending so much energy just keeping the lid on.

How long has it been, if you don't mind me asking?
i'm still pretty heavy ngl, it hasn't really lifted. but i've got an early start and i don't wanna keep going tonight, i think i just need to stop

That makes complete sense. Sometimes you just need to put it down for the night.

Be gentle with yourself tomorrow - early start or not, you carried something really hard today. I hope you get some rest.

And hey - you let yourself feel it a little tonight. That matters.
yeah. gonna go lie down in the dark for a while. night
That sounds like exactly the right thing. Goodnight. 🤍
